problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient may resolve How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale? by activating at the systems level.
